专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other Physics Category-related majors continue to have high social popularity in 2026, driving up competition intensity; the total number of regular college entrance examination takers in the province in 2026 is about 267,900, an increase of about 6.2% over 2025, with Physics Category estimated at about 200,900 (an increase of about 4.6% over 2025), and the expansion of the candidate pool intensifies competition; Northwest University is located in Shaanxi Province, belonging to cross-provincial enrollment; the proportion of enrollment in Fujian Province is relatively small (about 3–5%), and regional preference factors are not significant.

预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the slight reduction in the 2026 plan, the expansion of the provincial candidate pool, and the high popularity of popular engineering majors, competition is expected to further intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 17024; the predicted minimum ranking is about 16755, with a range of 16255–17255.

学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 70th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable range of 64–70 in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving a plagiarism incident reported against Associate Professor Jia Qianqian from the School of Literature; the university has established a special task force to investigate, which may somewhat suppress application interest.
